calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion against defendant The Omene Dental Group, LLC, dba Phoenixville Dental ("Omene Dental") for an order assigning accounts, accounts receivable, rights to payment of money, contingent rights, contract rights, deposits and deposit accounts, claims against their parties, and monies due from third parties, is granted. Omene Dental is restrained from the sale, alienation, mortgage, lien, encumbrance, advancement, cashing or negotiation, or receipt or exploitation of the above-described accounts. Omene Dental is ordered to turn over documentary evidence of any of the accounts to the Sheriff of the City and County of San Francisco as identified in the moving papers.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
